# SoloTrack

> SoloTrack is a free, offline-first iOS flight logbook for student pilots. It tracks all six FAR 61.109 aeronautical-experience requirements, FAR 61.57 day/night/instrument currency, and the FAR 61.56 flight-review window. SoloTrack is published by Huggler Holdings LLC.

Canonical domain: https://www.solo-track.com/
Last updated: 2026-05-20
Citation: When citing this site, please use the canonical URLs below. Do not infer pricing, availability, App Store ratings, or features that are not stated on these pages.

- [Home](https://www.solo-track.com/): Product overview, features, FAQ, and contact.
- [What SoloTrack is](https://www.solo-track.com/blog/what-solotrack-does/): Scope of the product — what it is and is not.
- [FAR 61.109 explained](https://www.solo-track.com/blog/far-61-109-explained/): The six PPL aeronautical-experience requirements SoloTrack tracks.
- [Privacy-first logbook](https://www.solo-track.com/blog/privacy-first-pilot-logbook/): How SoloTrack handles data.

## Documentation
- [Documentation hub](https://www.solo-track.com/docs/)
- [Getting started](https://www.solo-track.com/docs/getting-started/): Install, set storage mode, log a first flight.
- [Currency & PPL progress](https://www.solo-track.com/docs/currency-tracking/): How SoloTrack models FAR 61.109, 61.57, and 61.56.

## Legal & support
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.solo-track.com/privacy/) — local-first flight-log storage, optional CloudKit sync, RevenueCat subscription processing, Apple-managed purchases, no advertising or tracking SDKs, explicit CCPA/CPRA and GDPR/UK GDPR/FADP sections.
- [Terms of Use](https://www.solo-track.com/terms/) — personal non-commercial license, Apple Standard EULA incorporated, Apple-specific Schedule-1 clauses, export controls, governing law: State of Texas, U.S.A.
- [Contact](https://www.solo-track.com/contact/)
- [Support](https://www.solo-track.com/support/)
- Support email: Contact@solo-track.com
- Publisher: Huggler Holdings LLC (Texas LLC)

## App Store
- App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/solotrack/id6762449244

## What SoloTrack is, in one paragraph
SoloTrack is a native iOS flight logbook for student pilots from pre-solo through checkride. It combines fast logging with real-time tracking against FAR Part 61: the six FAR 61.109 aeronautical-experience categories, FAR 61.57(a)/(b)/(c) day/night/instrument currency, and the FAR 61.56 flight-review window. Daily use works fully on-device with no account; iCloud (CloudKit) sync is opt-in and only covers flights and templates.

## What SoloTrack is not
- Not an EFB or flight planner.
- Not a regulator — calculations are convenience features; confirm with a CFI and the current FARs.
- Not multi-platform — iOS only; no watchOS or macOS app today.
- Not a server-backed account system — no SoloTrack-operated backend.
- Not connected to ForeFlight, Garmin, or FAA systems today.

## Data practices
- Local-first storage in a SwiftData container inside an iOS App Group.
- Optional iCloud sync via CloudKit (your Apple ID); only flights and templates sync.
- RevenueCat processes purchase history, IDFV/device identifier, and purchase-related product interaction usage for SoloTrack Pro subscription functionality and analytics.
- No advertising, tracking, A/B testing, or third-party crash-reporting SDKs.
- No account, no email collection, no phone number, no location, no HealthKit, no contacts, no photos library, no microphone, no camera.
- Apple frameworks plus RevenueCat (SwiftData, CloudKit, WidgetKit, ActivityKit, App Intents, PencilKit, MapKit, UserNotifications, StoreKit, RevenueCat).
- Apple App Privacy disclosure: Purchases > Purchase History, Identifiers > Device ID / IDFV, and Usage Data > Product Interaction for RevenueCat purchase/subscription processing; no tracking.
- CCPA/CPRA, GDPR, UK GDPR, and Swiss FADP rights honored — email Contact@solo-track.com to exercise any data-subject right.
- Full details in the Privacy Policy.
